title: cabucala polysperma
intro: Cabucala polysperma, also known as the "Makabuhay" plant, is a species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate blood circulation and reduce fever. The leaves of the Cabucala polysperma plant have been used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and are also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
